component.name: QalKulator
component.summary: A fast, keyboard-first calculator for the desktop

description.p: QalKulator Calculator is a calculator with the calm of a phone and the power of a desktop: type naturally and watch the answer update live, keep every result in a shared register you can reach by keyboard, and flow a value straight from a calculation into a unit or currency conversion and back.

ul.li: Calculate-as-you-type with a live result preview
A shared result register: recall and reuse any past result
Unit and currency conversion, powered by libqalculate
Frictionless flow of results between calculation and conversion
Keyboard-first, with visible shortcut cues and an Alt access-key overlay
